title: Custom Crosshair X
description: Add a gui with crosshair customization
body:
# CustomCrosshair Mod
Customize your crosshair easily! Press [C] to open the GUI and change its look. Fully compatible with Minecraft keybind settings. Simple, light, and perfect for PvP!
![Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f76ee019474e1231005dd454ae0be7c0f54572f.png)
Its everything.
